calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
James Millar, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Julio Paniagua, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Rosario Polis and Vida Cheryl Quemada Angeles.
Exhibit 1 - Rental Agreement----------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Proof of Service on Three-Day Notice dtd. 01-08-07------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 458 Athens St., #1, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back-Rent and Damages $3,333.35
Costs $245.00, for a Total of $3,578.35
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits and to prepare Judgment.

11:30 A.M.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-25-2007 Advanced From Feb-20-07 To Feb-07-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
CHRISTINA J. COLLINS FROM MILLAR & ASSOCIATES, 981-8100, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND OPPOSING PARTY
ROSARIO POLIS AND VIDA QUEMADA ANGELES, 240-1464, DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES APPEARING IN PROPERIA PERSONA

MATTER WAS CALLED AND PASSED AT 9:33 A.M. TO BE HEARD ON THE CONTESTED PORTION OF THE CALENDAR. AT 9:53 A.M. THE MATTER WAS RECALLED, AND THE DEFENDANTS WERE NO LONGER PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT NOTIFIED OF DEFENDANTS APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT VIDA QUEMADA ANGELES AND ROSARIO POLIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. FIVE DAYS TO ANSWER. SERVICE OF A 3 DAY NOTICE IS EFFECTIVE ON THE DAY IT IS POSTED AND MAILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
